sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108219" key="u(pogumna/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπογυμνάζω</orth>, <sense id="n108219.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">practise,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰς πολεμιστηρίους ἀσκήσεις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
